script_text: The word hat has a short A sound.
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing.

script_text: Watch this magic! Add an E to the end. Hat becomes hate. The E is silent, but it makes the A say its name.
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing.

script_text: That is Magic E. Silent at the end, but it changes the vowel sound!
voice_direction: Warm calm kindergarten teacher voice. Natural pacing.
